security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://i.ytimg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; script-src 'self'; media-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://*.googlevideo.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://*.googlevideo.com
